plan_kts:
data class Result(val verdict: String, val evidence: List<String>, val risks: List<String>)

data class DiffSummary(val changedFiles: List<String>, val productionFiles: List<String>, val testFiles: List<String>, val touchedModules: List<String>)
data class TestInventory(val directTests: List<String>, val nearbyTests: List<String>, val buildFiles: List<String>)
data class CoherenceReport(val verdict: String, val evidence: List<String>, val risks: List<String>)

fun plan(): Result {
    val repoReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val maintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerification = readFile(".repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")

    val status = gitStatusShort()
    val baseRef = detectReviewBase(status)
    val changedNames = gitDiffNameOnly(baseRef)
    val changedDiff = gitDiffUnified(baseRef)
    val diffSummary = summarizeDiff(changedNames, changedDiff)

    val domainContextPaths = selectRepoContextForModules(diffSummary.touchedModules, generatedIndex, repoIndex)
    val domainContexts = readFiles(domainContextPaths)

    val candidateTestPaths = findRelevantTests(diffSummary.productionFiles, diffSummary.testFiles, domainContexts)
    val testContents = readFiles(candidateTestPaths)
    val buildPaths = findBuildAndTestConfigFiles(diffSummary.changedFiles, candidateTestPaths)
    val buildContents = readFiles(buildPaths)
    val testInventory = buildTestInventory(candidateTestPaths, testContents, buildPaths)

    val sourceContracts = extractBehavioralContracts(changedDiff, domainContexts, engineeringPrinciples)
    val testAssertions = extractTestAssertions(testContents, buildContents)
    val hotPathAssessment = assessHotPathTestRisk(changedDiff, domainContexts, engineeringPrinciples)
    val statefulAssessment = assessStatefulTestRisk(changedDiff, domainContexts, engineeringPrinciples)
    val coherenceReport = evaluateTestsCoherence(diffSummary, testInventory, sourceContracts, testAssertions, hotPathAssessment, statefulAssessment)
    val verification = applySelfVerification(selfVerification, coherenceReport)

    return Result(verdict = verification.verdict, evidence = verification.evidence, risks = verification.risks)
}
